title: Uncreative
description: A Create mod modpack all about weapons and cannons. Not very creative!
body:
# Uncreative

A Create mod modpack focused on weapons and cannons. Get ready for non-stop action! 

This pack includes awesome mods made by talented creators that let you build cannons, construct lightsabers, and even shoot lasers from your hands. The possibilities are endless!

## Key Features

### Bazookas

Unleash explosive mayhem with high-powered bazookas. 

![Bazooka](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jpP96kjH/images/47b79fca6d25f9cc3322cee62a800aa1398a6723.gif)

### Lightsabers

Feel like a Jedi Knight with mystical lightsabers in different colors.

![Lightsabers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jpP96kjH/images/0550ea63d99da386ccc071afcfb93facb26745e3.gif)
